# vector: status_resp
# STATUS_RESP: RUNNING state, Scope mode STREAM
# raw  = frame before COBS (ver|type|flags|seq|len|payload|crc32c, all LE)
# wire = COBS(raw) + 0x00 delimiter, the actual SCI-link octets

wire: 035882020202540202010101010715cd5b07d7110103d61101020701010101010106ebb6cc08010101020901010101010102030101031027010368100103841c010340060103840301022805bccc5b070101010101010102030101050633e02e00
